title: Gunpowder Crafting
description: A way to craft gunpowder and flint.
body:
## Craftable Gunpowder!
![Gunpowder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YYGB8khI/images/b6e090e3b9cb5710708a643d1060abe9dfe8708c.png)

Whether you are in peaceful mode or can't find those pesky creepers, you can always be able to craft yourself some gunpowder in times of need. No need to go thousands of blocks to kill creepers or to build creeper farms, using natural items that you have stockpiled you can make your own gunpowder.

## Guaranteed Flint Drop
![Flint Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YYGB8khI/images/aac93d25a232b5bc5b4f9635fb12c5a62de3e275.png)

Breaking hundreds of gravel and not getting a flint drop? No worries! Just use 3 and get a guaranteed 1/3 drop chance with a crafting recipe.
